emails.subject: Welcome to Greenway — your first steps
emails.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thanks for creating your Greenway account. Over the next week we'll walk you through importing your first portfolio and setting up alerts.

Today: log in and connect a brokerage in Settings > Connections. It takes about two minutes.

Reply to this email if anything looks off — a real person reads it.

— The Greenway team

You can update your email preferences or unsubscribe at https://greenway.example/prefs?u=8842
Greenway Energy Capital, 3100 Dick Pond Road, Suite 200, Myrtle Beach, SC 29588

emails.subject: How to read your first portfolio report
emails.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Now that your account is connected, here is how to make sense of the daily report: the top card shows net exposure, the table below ranks positions by contribution.

Watch the 90-second walkthrough in the help center when you have a moment.

— The Greenway team

To stop receiving onboarding tips, unsubscribe at https://greenway.example/prefs?u=8842
Greenway Energy Capital, 3100 Dick Pond Road, Suite 200, Myrtle Beach, SC 29588

emails.subject: Setting price and risk alerts that actually help
emails.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Last tip for this week: alerts. Most people start with a single drawdown alert at -8% and a weekly summary. You can always add more later.

That's it for onboarding. We'll switch you to the regular weekly note from here.

— The Greenway team

Manage your email preferences or unsubscribe: https://greenway.example/prefs?u=8842
Greenway Energy Capital, 3100 Dick Pond Road, Suite 200, Myrtle Beach, SC 29588
